 INTRODUCTION 
I.1. Summary 
This document is the user manual for the CMEMS Sea Temperature extreme variability Ocean 
Monitoring Indicators (OMIs): 
 
BLKSEA_OMI_TEMPSAL_extreme_var_temp_mean_and_anomaly 
IBI_OMI_TEMPSAL_extreme_var_temp_mean_and_anomaly 
MEDSEA

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for CMEMS Sea Temperature extreme variability Ocean Monitoring Indicators, providing details on the BLKSEA_OMI_TEMPSAL_extreme_var_temp_mean_and_anomaly, IBI_OMI_TEMPSAL_extreme_var_temp_mean_and_anomaly, and MEDSEA_OMI_TEMPSAL_extreme_var_temp_mean_and_anomaly products.

product_line.name: Sea Temperature extreme variability Ocean Monitoring Indicators
product_line.region: Black Sea, IBI, Mediterranean Sea, Northwest Shelf Seas
